goal: Final qualification of the microstructure route into one of three honest statuses: confirmed true overlay, confirmed replacement layer, or watchlist/reject against immutable base active-signal-v1@1.
global_constraints: Never modify the immutable base snapshot active-signal-v1@1.
All key comparisons must use active-signal-v1@1 as the sole decision reference; @3 is auxiliary only.
Overlay and replacement tracks must never be mixed in the same narrative or run.
Every threshold must have documented provenance: quantile rule or selection-OOS search with frozen lockbox. No hand-tuned magic numbers.
All comparisons must be same-window: base @1, variant, and combined run on identical time windows.
Simple rules (bucket, threshold, quantile) must be evaluated before any model-based approach.
Short-only, long-only, and combined side splits must all be evaluated independently.
Old routes (IV, breadth, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, directional classification on old universe) are closed and must not be reopened.
No new data families or macro universe until microstructure qualification is complete.

slices.title: Build true overlay implementation over @1
slices.hypothesis: Construct true overlay variants where microstructure acts only as a causal allow/block gate on top of the base @1 signals, preserving signal IDs and entry timing with zero retroactive replacement.
slices.objective: Construct true overlay variants where microstructure acts only as a causal allow/block gate on top of the base @1 signals, preserving signal IDs and entry timing with zero retroactive replacement.
success_criteria: Three honest true-overlay snapshots exist with causal blocking verified and no replacement logic.
evidence_requirements: Three honest true-overlay snapshots exist with causal blocking verified and no replacement logic.

slices.title: Simple-rule overlay tests on selection window
slices.hypothesis: Run true overlay variants on the selection window across all threshold sets and side modes to determine whether overlay has any signal before committing to lockbox runs.
slices.objective: Run true overlay variants on the selection window across all threshold sets and side modes to determine whether overlay has any signal before committing to lockbox runs.
success_criteria: Shortlist of true-overlay candidates promoted for lockbox testing exists.
evidence_requirements: Shortlist of true-overlay candidates promoted for lockbox testing exists.

slices.title: True overlay lockbox test against base @1
slices.hypothesis: Run surviving true-overlay candidates on the frozen lockbox window against base @1 to obtain a definitive verdict on whether microstructure works as a true overlay.
slices.objective: Run surviving true-overlay candidates on the frozen lockbox window against base @1 to obtain a definitive verdict on whether microstructure works as a true overlay.
success_criteria: Final verdict on true-overlay track obtained: confirmed, weak, or rejected.
evidence_requirements: Final verdict on true-overlay track obtained: confirmed, weak, or rejected.
